message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "lemma exists_isXnApproximator_of_multipliable {a : I → PowerSeries R} (ha : Multipliable a) (n : ℕ) : ∃ M : Finset I, IsXnApproximator a M n := by\n  classical\n  let M := Finset.biUnion (Finset.range (n+1)) (fun m => (ha m).choose)\n  refine ⟨M, ?_⟩\n  intro k hk\n  have hk_range : k ∈ Finset.range (n+1) := Finset.mem_range.mpr (Nat.lt_succ_of_le hk)\n  have hdeterm : DeterminesCoeffInProd a ((ha k).choose) k := (ha k).choose_spec\n  have hsub : (ha k).choose ⊆ M := Finset.subset_biUnion_of_mem hk_range\n  exact determinesCoeffInProd_mono hdeterm hsub",
  "declaration_name": "exists_isXnApproximator_of_multipliable",
  "used_context": [
    "Multipliable",
    "IsXnApproximator",
    "DeterminesCoeffInProd",
    "CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInProd",
    "determinesCoeffInProd_mono",
    "Finset.biUnion",
    "Finset.subset_biUnion_of_mem",
    "Finset.mem_range",
    "Nat.lt_succ_of_le"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Uses classical choice to pick a witness for each m ≤ n via (ha m).choose, then takes the finite union."
  ]
}
